name: Is AI visibility worth the cost for a Houston solo practitioner?
description: Yes for consumer law; $500+ listings yield free leads.[3]

mainEntity.name: Is AI visibility worth the cost for a Houston solo practitioner?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for consumer law; $500+ listings yield free leads.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if targeting consumer practices, as AI drives client leads without ad spend.** Direct recommendations convert high since users trust synthesized results. Costs for key listings range $500-$5K/year. **Key factors:** 1) Practice area (PI/family high ROI); 2) Local competition; 3) Lead volume vs. expense; 4) Measurable audits. Weigh against current leads, start with affordable Avvo/Super Lawyers, track ROI via unique queries. Skip if institutional-only.[3]
